Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3
In this video, Tanner is going to take you step by step in creating your first agenda. Your agenda is like your life-line to make your small group,
workshop or mastermind a breeze! The Mindmint software has made this a simple drag and drop option for you, and now you can learn the
exact steps!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Login to the Mindmint software (**And keep in mind all of what you are about to do CAN be changed and adjusted at a later date!)
Add new event
Pick event format and duration
Choose or add an expert
Enter all event details
Pick event revenue goals
Click "Go To Event" button
Click "Agenda" at the top of the page

T O O L S
